{{Infobox event
|name=The Queen's arbitrary execution sentences for minor infractions transform the game into an exercise in chaos and terror
|participants=Queen
|chapitre=8
}}

== Course of events ==

The Queen's practice of sentencing individuals to execution for minor infractions demonstrates her capricious approach to authority. Her willingness to employ capital punishment in response to trivial transgressions transforms the nature of the game fundamentally.

Under the Queen's arbitrary rule, the game becomes an exercise in chaos and terror. The severity and unpredictability of her execution sentences—applied even to minor infractions—reshape the conditions of gameplay. Any minor infraction carries the prospect of the ultimate penalty, fundamentally altering the character and experience of participation in the game.

== References ==

- Alice's Adventures in Wonderland

[[Category:Événements]]
